notes: Veteran open-source infrastructure monitoring system (NetSaint 1999, renamed 2002); creator Ethan Galstad's official FAQ spells it out as "nah-ghee-ose" ‚ÄĒ "Nah" plus the start of "geese" plus the end of "verbose" ‚ÄĒ so the g is hard, never "NAY-jee-os", and Wikipedia records the same /ňąn…Ďňź…°iňźo äs/.
